tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"configure terminal
policy-map POLICE-INTF
 class class-default
  police 1000000 100000 100000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
exit
interface Gi0/2
 service-policy input POLICE-INTF
exit
interface Gi0/3
 service-policy input POLICE-INTF
exit
interface Gi1/0
 service-policy input POLICE-INTF
exit
interface Gi1/1
 service-policy input POLICE-INTF
exit
interface Gi1/3
 service-policy input POLICE-INTF
exit
interface Gi0/0
 service-policy input POLICE-INTF
end
write memory"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "compromised-host"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block-ICMP-Compromised"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "Port1"
set srcaddr "compromised-host"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
end

execute firewall policy list
"}

tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 1
set name "Block-ICMP-From-Compromised"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"

next

show firewall policy 1

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # edit 1

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set name "Block-ICMP-From-Compromised"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set srcaddr "compromised-host"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set service "PING"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy 1
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "Block-ICMP-From-Compromised"
        set uuid a52a0f56-1612-51f1-3f57-09d06c065067
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "compromised-host"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
